title: shell completion --format: work with nil structs
body:
AutocompleteFormat() takes the format struct as argument. Often the structs
are deeply nested and contain other structs. Up until now if there was a
pointer to a struct the logic was not able to get the field names from
that, simply because the pointer was nil. However it is possible to
create a new initialized type with reflect.New(). This allows us to
complete all struct fields/functions even when there nil pointers.
Therefore we can drop the extra initialization which was done by some
callers.

```release-note
Improved autocompletion for some commands
```

@edsantiago PTAL

I think this should help with https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14046

I'm not entirely sure how it helps, but here are the diffs between last night's run of `xref-helpmsgs-manpages` and a run right now rebased on this PR:
```diff
+ 'podman events --format': .Details in docs/source/markdown/podman-events.1.md, but not --help
+ 'podman machine inspect --format': .VM in docs/source/markdown/podman-machine-inspect.1.md, but not --help
+ 'podman network ls --format': .Network in docs/source/markdown/podman-network-ls.1.md, but not --help
+ 'podman pod ps --format': .ListPodsReport in docs/source/markdown/podman-pod-ps.1.md, but not --help
+ 'podman system connection list --format': .Destination in docs/source/markdown/podman-system-connection-list.1.md, but not --help
```
(to me, these suggest that those options disappeared from autocompletion, and indeed that seems to be the case)
```diff
- 'podman network inspect': --format options documented in man page, but not available via autocomplete
```
(this suggests that `podman network inspect` now offers autocomplete, and indeed that is the case)
Quick followup: the newly-added `CreatedAt` and `CreatedSince` options (podman images, podman history) still don't show up in autocomplete.

...and, now that I've actually _looked_ at your code instead of blindly running my script on it, I see that that's exactly what you aimed to fix. Cleaner autocompletion code, cleaner results. Nice work. LGTM but I'll defer the slash-lgtm for someone else to weigh in.

> I'm not entirely sure how it helps, but here are the diffs between last night's run of `xref-helpmsgs-manpages` and a run right now rebased on this PR:
> 
> ```diff
> + 'podman events --format': .Details in docs/source/markdown/podman-events.1.md, but not --help
> + 'podman machine inspect --format': .VM in docs/source/markdown/podman-machine-inspect.1.md, but not --help
> + 'podman network ls --format': .Network in docs/source/markdown/podman-network-ls.1.md, but not --help
> + 'podman pod ps --format': .ListPodsReport in docs/source/markdown/podman-pod-ps.1.md, but not --help
> + 'podman system connection list --format': .Destination in docs/source/markdown/podman-system-connection-list.1.md, but not --help
> ```
> 
> (to me, these suggest that those options disappeared from autocompletion, and indeed that seems to be the case)

Yes because they were more or less duplicated. Take `podman network ls --format {{.Network.` for example. The is no reason to document Network because Network is an anonymous field, `{{.` and `{{.Network.` are the same so all fields are already listed.
Yes... I understood that once I actually took the time to read your code (I'm slow sometimes). Thank you!

> Quick followup: the newly-added `CreatedAt` and `CreatedSince` options (podman images, podman history) still don't show up in autocomplete.

Fixed in latest commit.

Yes it is, for `image history`. It looks like a similar change may be needed to  [images/list.go](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/2b8cafc0671fbbd155770f044b8216f050877192/cmd/podman/images/list.go) or [entities/images.go](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/2b8cafc0671fbbd155770f044b8216f050877192/pkg/domain/entities/images.go) for `image list`? (Just commenting; I have no sense for how difficult or important that is)

It should be very easy I just need to know which commands use the wrong struct.
@edsantiago I made some more changes. Mind checking against your script again. It should now use the same struct which is used in the template everywhere.

Nice! New script results (slightly massaged for legibility):
```
'podman container list --format --help' lists '.Cgroup', which is not in docs/source/markdown/podman-ps.1.md
'podman container list --format --help' lists '.CreatedHuman', which is not in docs/source/markdown/podman-ps.1.md
'podman container list --format --help' lists '.RunningFor', which is not in docs/source/markdown/podman-ps.1.md
'podman container list --format --help' lists '.User', which is not in docs/source/markdown/podman-ps.1.md
      [same with podman ps and podman container ps, because they're the same thing]

'podman image list --format --help' lists '.CreatedTime', which is not in docs/source/markdown/podman-images.1.md
     [same with podman images]

'podman image search': --format options documented in man page, but not available via autocomplete
    [same with podman search]
```
pushed another fix for `podman image search`

And, good news, `podman search` and `podman-search.1.md` agree on the first try. I love seeing that.

Once I add the above fields (`.CreatedTime`, `.Cgroup`, etc) to my local copy of the man pages, the script passes cleanly. LGTM!
